Query.SQL: SELECT DISTINCT GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "GA.ADDRESS_ID" , GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE AS "GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , GA.VALID_TO AS "GA.VALID_TO" , GA.VALID_FROM AS "GA.VALID_FROM" , GA.POSTCODE AS "GA.POSTCODE" , GA.PARTY_ID AS "GA.PARTY_ID" , GA.REFERENCE AS "GA.REFERENCE" , GA.CASE_NUMBER AS "GA.CASE_NUMBER" , GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE" , GA.CASE_PARTY_NO AS "GA.CASE_PARTY_NO" , GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" , CPR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CPR_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND GA.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND GA.CASE_NUMBER = CPR.CASE_NUMBER AND GA.CASE_PARTY_NO = ${CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO} AND GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = ${CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE}
